title: Create EI: Ink Sac Automasitation
description: Provides balanced recipes for ink sac to use with Create: Enchantment Industry
body:
This is a datapack for Create:Enchantment Industry that adds two new recipes to craft ink sac.

**Compressing:**
  - 500mB Water + Any Coal + Dried Kelp -> 2 Ink Sacs

 **Spouting**
  -  500mB Ink + Dried Kelp -> 2 Ink Sacs
